heading: Effective date
label: 7506 Effective date
text: This chapter shall apply to any non-Federal entity with respect to any of its fiscal years which begin after .June 30, 1996
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 7506, added , , ; amended , , , related to the monitoring responsibilities of the Comptroller General, prior to repeal by , , .Pub. Amendments2016— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 114–301section 7507 of this title1996— struck out “; report” after “Effective date” in section catchline and amended text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows:Pub. L. 104–156“(a) This chapter shall apply to any State or local government with respect to any of its fiscal years which begin after .December 31, 1984“(b) The Director, on or before , and annually thereafter, shall submit to each House of Congress a report on operations under this chapter. Each such report shall specifically identify each Federal agency or State or local government which is failing to comply with this chapter.”May 1, 1987
